title: Post by theneurofactory
description:
She was nominated 7 times for the Nobel Prize. She never received it.

Dr. Johanna Budwig was a German biochemist with doctorates in physics and chemistry. She worked as Chief Expert for pharmaceuticals and fats at the German Federal Health Office.

In the 1950s, she discovered something that threatened everything the food and pharmaceutical industries were built on.

She found that people with cancer were consistently deficient in polyunsaturated fatty acids. Without these fats, cell membranes break down. Oxygen can't enter cells. And when cells lose oxygen, cancer thrives.

Her solution was almost too simple. Flaxseed oil mixed with cottage cheese. The sulfhydryl proteins in cottage cheese bond with omega-3s in flaxseed oil, making them absorbable by cells. This floods cells with oxygen.

She reported extraordinary results across multiple cancer types. Studies on flaxseed have since confirmed its ability to reduce tumor growth, cut metastasis by up to 70%, and enhance the effects of existing cancer treatments.

So why haven't you heard of her?

Because she refused to sell her protocol to pharmaceutical companies who wanted to patent it and profit from it. She openly attacked trans fats, processed oils, and margarine decades before the mainstream caught on.

She was blackballed. Silenced. Erased from medical history.

She died in 2003 at the age of 94. Her work lives on through those who share it.

Save this. Share it with someone who needs to see it.
